name: Elbmesh Maintain Docs
title: Maintain Elbmesh Documentation
summary: Keep Elbmesh documentation, ADRs, glossary, implementation plans, generated-doc notes, and agent guidance aligned with architecture and implementation changes.
description: Use this task when updating docs or when a code/manifest change creates documentation drift.

validations.title: Documentation drift review
criteria: ADRs are added or updated for architecture decisions.
Glossary, implementation plan, phased delivery plan, README indexes, PPP tasks, and the central PPP route map are updated when their vocabulary or workflow changes.
Generated docs are not manually edited once generation exists; generated Markdown and JSON share manifest hash and generator version when generation exists.
Open questions are recorded instead of hiding unresolved decisions.

items: Read docs/README.md, docs/GOAL.md, docs/GLOSSARY.md, docs/DEVELOPMENT_WORKFLOW.md, docs/PHASED_DELIVERY_PLAN.md, docs/AGENT_SKILLS.md, docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, and relevant ADRs.
Update ADRs, glossary, implementation plan, phased delivery plan, README indexes, PPP tasks, and the central PPP route map when architecture or workflow changes require it.
Treat documentation drift as a defect and preserve Resource, Action, Event, Reaction, External Operation, View, Query, journal, and manifest vocabulary.
Do not manually edit generated docs once generation exists; record regeneration needs with manifest hash and generator version expectations.
Record open questions explicitly when a decision remains unresolved.
